title: Create Defensive
description: Create: Defensive is a military-industrial expansion to the Create mod centered on warfare and defense.
body:
![Create: Defensive Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe393bf8d9fabcc945f62dae45ec731c3ffc72e7.png)
# Summary
**Create: Defensive** is a military industrial addon for the Create Mod. It's focused on combat capabilities and maximum devastation! 

⚠️1.20.1 Forge is **No longer supported!**⚠️
Bugs and issues related to 1.20.1 Forge will not be resolved. Any new features, fixes, and changes, will be in future versions, with the current supported version being **NeoForge 1.21.1**

# Mod Features
## New Weapons
- Guns: Handguns, Rifles, and Shotguns! More planned soon
- Explosives: Chemical Explosives, Napalm Bombs, High Explosives, as well as Warheads and Dynamite are in the mod!
- Traps: Fire Grate traps, Gas Traps, Air Traps, Lightning Node Traps, Landmines, and Proximity Mines
- There are over a dozen new types of Weapons and Tools ranging from Halberds to Great Swords to Morningstars. The battlefield is your canvas and your enemies are your paint!
## New Armor
- The mod introduces 17 new armor sets to the game for every stage in the game. There are weaker sets like Copper or Aluminum that are weaker but more common than Iron, or endgame sets like Pyraen that are direct upgrades to Netherite.
- There are also blast-plating blocks and Bullet-proof glass that can protect you from explosions.
## New Materials
The mod introduces well over a dozen brand new materials with many uses including more automation capabilities, chemical synthesis, and parts in machinery.
## New Machinery
- Coking Oven: Can be used to turn Coal into Coal Coke and Logs into Charcoal, with Creosote Oil as a byproduct
- Electrolyzer: Can be used to separate some particles into their components
- Fractional Still: Can be used to separate Crude Oil and Natural Gas into their fractions
- Centrifuge: Can be used to separate items into their crafting materials
